About Us

Who we are

Haas Clark Holdings LLC is a Denver, Colorado-based company focused on building consumer software products that help people take control of their lives. We build tools that solve real problems — not just incremental improvements, but meaningful interventions that make a difference.

Our approach is simple: identify a problem that genuinely affects people's lives, build the most effective tool to solve it, and put it in their hands. We believe technology can be a powerful force for personal recovery and wellbeing when built with care and purpose.

Our Products

What we build

NoDice — Gambling Blocker

NoDice is an iOS app that helps people quit gambling by blocking access to gambling websites and apps at the DNS level, directly on their device. No traffic is routed through external servers — all filtering happens locally. NoDice also tracks streaks, calculates savings, and provides tools to support long-term recovery.

Visit NoDice →

Scramble — Golf Matchmaking

Scramble connects golfers with like-minded players based on play style, pace, and skill level. Whether you're looking for a casual weekend round or a competitive game, Scramble finds your crew so you never have to tee off alone again.

Visit Scramble →

Our Values

What we stand for

Privacy First

We build tools that work on your device, not in the cloud. Your data stays yours.

Real Impact

We focus on problems that genuinely affect people's lives and build solutions that actually work.

Built with Care

Every product we ship is designed with empathy for the people who need it most.
